scripts.manifest:emit: npm run build && node scripts/emit-manifest.mjs ../site-manifest.yaml generated-manifest
scripts.ui:emit: npm run build && node scripts/emit-ui.mjs ../site-manifest.yaml generated-ui ../.browserslistrc
scripts.ui:r3f:build: npm --prefix ui-r3f install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix ui-r3f test
scripts.manifest:check: npm run test && npm run manifest:emit && npm run ui:emit && npm run browser:check
